## Checklist

- [ ] Linked to an issue — `Closes #N` (or exempt: Dependabot/hotfix)
- [ ] CI is green
- [ ] Coverage stays at 100%
- [ ] No comments in Go code (only `//go:build`, `//go:embed`, `//go:generate`)
